title: Architect Binary Wire-Protocols
description: Design custom binary wire-protocols for low-latency network communication. Implement efficient serializing and deserializing logic for binary data. Apply binary wire-protocols for P2P or internal IPC socket communication.
objectives: Design custom binary wire-protocols for low-latency network communication.
Implement efficient serializing and deserializing logic for binary data.
Apply binary wire-protocols for P2P or internal IPC socket communication.
